results.rendered_html:
ā-√śaṅk Ā. -śaṅkate (seldom P. -saṅkati) to suspect, fear, doubt, hesitate,  MBh. ;  R. ;  Kathās. ;  Hit.  &c.;
to expect, suppose, conjecture, think, imagine,  Ragh. ;  Kathās. ;  Pañcat.  &c.;
(in grammatical and philosophical discussions) to object, state a possible objection ;
to mistrust,  Bhaṭṭ.
